heading: Get Started with n8n
body:
To install n8n, refer to the [n8n documentation](https://docs.n8n.io/hosting/)
or run the following command using [npm](https://docs.n8n.io/hosting/installation/npm)
to quickly get started:

```
npx n8n
```

To learn how to build a basic AI agent using n8n and MongoDB,
see [Build an AI Agent with MongoDB and n8n](n8n-get-started).

> **Important:** All MongoDB n8n nodes require you to configure your MongoDB credentials
> in n8n. To learn more, see [MongoDB Credentials](https://docs.n8n.io/integrations/builtin/credentials/mongodb/).
